{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323013549835EB41DB6BC44B71CD7"}"},"total":21},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7602278662105465662","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的是被书名耽误的宝藏！本来以为是普通的聊天群爽文，没想到作者把现实生活的小细节（比如看电影静音）和穿越者群聊的高能剧情结合得这么好。主角楚茵的日常吐槽真实又可爱，群里的穿越者大佬们更是各有各的活，从修仙到星际，从古代到未来，各种脑洞大开的剧情看得人眼花缭乱。节奏快、笑点密，还带点小爽感，书荒的朋友直接冲就完了！","text_exts":[{"e":26,"s":23,"text":"聊天群","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E7%BE%A4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177420094944B71CD7%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227602278662105465662%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227599132051442240574%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E7%BE%A4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770045487,"group_id":"7599132051442240574","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"于尘世中孤守，于浮华中炼心","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2QZugRKrUijJaJ+KNDve/Q=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e1ec4412ccd840b4ad518ddb57b28c87~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789293&x-signature=b%2FfWyu7SoMVMGur4BRiywo%2FiJ94%3D","user_id":"270930670788000","user_name":"清风拂杨柳可"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"270930670788000","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":0,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7599132051442240574","book_info":{"abstract":"【都市+都市脑洞+爽文+聊天群+群友穿越者……】
　　秦阳开局获得神级聊天群，群里赫然都是穿越者。
　　有的穿越到了丧尸世界，有的穿越到了诡异世界，有的已经成为皇帝，有的还是矿奴……
　　秦阳发现群红包竟然能够传物品。
　　“群主，我给你黄金和玉石，麻烦你给我点吃的。”
　　“群主，麻烦你去看看我爸妈，我给你能强化身体的灵液，谢谢。”
　　“群主，我妹妹很漂亮，我把她托付给你——”
　　……
　　随着群等级提升，群里的大佬越来越多，秦阳这个群主的实力也越来越强。
　　仙也好，佛也好，都只是他的群员。
　　圣人也得叫他一声群主。
　　且看秦阳如何从一个小人物走向无敌。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o904513e84739b141cecb5a0cea0cb46e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"女帝666","author_id":"","book_id":"7599132051442240574","book_name":"神级聊天群：群友都是穿越者？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":381,"name":"聊天群","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=381&name=聊天群&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7599134960284353086","read_count":"12571","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"121063"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"58","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,穿越,聊天群,无敌,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o904513e84739b141cecb5a0cea0cb46e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384949&x-signature=gfE%2BCjP0MoX%2FO4SKlOWoFKyDyFk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"5368473931","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323013549835EB41DB6BC44B71CD7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwa
